questions.q: According to the May 2026 Patch 1.05.00 for Crimson Desert, players can now pick up previously decorative gold bars scattered in the world to yield what item?
options: A Crude Gold Bar worth 5 Silver
questions.correctText: A Crude Gold Bar worth 5 Silver

questions.q: In an expanded access ruling covered on May 3, 2026, the FDA allowed 'compassionate use' of the experimental drug daraxonrasib to treat which deadly disease, famously affecting former Senator Ben Sasse?
Which actor, known for playing Sheriff Ben Meeker in the 'Halloween' franchise and Henry's father in 'Goodfellas', died at the age of 81 according to May 2026 reports?
As of May 2026, health authorities in Hong Kong have begun heavily enforcing a new public law that completely bans which of the following activities in public spaces?
options: Selling fast food within business districts

questions.q: Which former Formula 1 driver and Paralympic champion passed away at the age of 59?
It was announced in May 2026 that Ralph Fiennes, Colin Farrell, and Wagner Moura will star in the comedy film 'Art' directed by which 'City of God' filmmaker?
Also debuting on the May 3, 2026 New York Times Bestseller list is 'Yesteryear', a novel about a modern social media influencer who wakes up in 1855. Who is the author?
Highlighted in the Week of May 3, 2026 'Sunday Paper Recommends', Kathryn Stockett has released her first novel in fifteen years, set in 1933 Mississippi. What is its title?
In a May 2026 interview, Naoki Hamaguchi, the director of the Final Fantasy VII Remake trilogy, revealed that he has already completed how many full playthroughs of the unreleased third game?
In early May 2026, Take-Two's CEO Strauss Zelnick stated that GTA 6 won't feature real-world brand partnerships for what primary reason?
options: Because all the brands are made up
The licensing costs are too high
questions.correctText: Because all the brands are made up
